subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God, O Lord of Names and Creator of the heavens! I beseech Thee by the pearls of the ocean of Thy utterance and Thy mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا اله الاسماء و فاطر السماء اسئلک بلئالی بحر بیانک و اسرارک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God
